name: Analytics contract and data foundation
description: Generate DTOs from OpenAPI, implement Analytics HTTP service + ResourceCache layer, Money pipe, and shared utilities.

tasks.description: Produce a decision register for analytics covering: Money serialization (decimal string + ISO currency) display strategy, bucket-aware period key formatting and validation rules, default period selection per module (monthly last-6 months), cache TTL strategy by module, error mapping for RFC 7807 problem+json, navigation structure (horizontal tabs mirroring manage pattern), shared period store scope, charts library choice (PrimeNG p-chart with chart.js), fallback strategy when dataCompleteness != FULL, accessibility expectations, and screen structure for each module.

Create TypeScript DTO models under src/app/shared/models/dto/analytics/ matching the analytics.yaml schemas: Money, MetricValue, Period, DataCompleteness, TimeBucket, PrimeCostReport, MenuEngineeringReport, OperationsReport, CohortReport, Alert, AlertsPage, AlertSeverity, AlertStatus, AlertType, ProblemDetail, and sub-types.

Replace existing single-method Analytics service at src/app/core/services/analytics/analytics.ts with full coverage: getPrimeCost, getMenuEngineering, getOperations, getCohort, listAlerts (with filters), markAlertRead, getTopSellingProducts kept for back-compat.

Create AnalyticsCacheService with one ResourceCache per module (primeCost, menuEngineering, operations, cohort, alerts) using appropriate TTLs, plus a shared period signal store at src/app/core/services/analytics/analytics-period-state.ts that the shell and sub-pages consume.

Implement MoneyPipe (displays COP with thousands sep and no decimals) and MetricValuePipe (generic decimal formatting) plus period key utility (formatPeriodKey bucket-aware) at src/app/shared/pipes/ and src/app/core/services/analytics/analytics-utils.ts.

Add foundation tests at src/app/core/services/analytics/ covering HTTP URLs and params (query string, limits, offsets), problem+json error mapping, Money/MetricValue pipe localization, period key formatting, and cache TTL/invalidation.
Review foundation DTO alignment with analytics.yaml, resource/service/cache separation, period state contract, and Money/MetricValue rounding rules.

name: Analytics shell, navigation, and period selector
description: Refactor existing analytics page into a parent shell with router-outlet, internal sub-routes for the five modules, horizontal tab navigation, and a shared period selector that writes to the period state.

tasks.description: Convert src/app/areas/admin/features/analytics/analytics.ts into a parent component with router-outlet and add five child routes (prime-cost, menu-engineering, operations, cohort, alerts) in src/app/app.routes.ts so each module lives at /admin/analytics/<module>; keep top-level redirect to 'prime-cost'.

Build AnalyticsNav horizontal tab nav at src/app/areas/admin/features/analytics/components/analytics-nav/ mirroring the manage.ts nav style with five tabs (Prime Cost, Menu, Operations, Cohort, Alerts) and active state via routerLinkActive.

Build PeriodSelectorComponent at src/app/areas/admin/features/analytics/components/period-selector/ with bucket dropdown (daily/weekly/monthly/yearly), from/to inputs, validation (to >= from), and default = last-6-months monthly; bound to AnalyticsPeriodState.

Wire PeriodSelector + AnalyticsNav into the analytics shell; ensure five placeholder module pages (each showing its title and stub skeleton) so navigation lands somewhere useful while modules are built.
Add shell tests covering active-route highlighting, default period initialization, validation error display, and child navigation.
Review shell navigation accessibility (keyboard tab order, ARIA), shared period store reactivity across pages, responsive layout mobile/tablet/desktop, and route guard behavior.

name: Prime Cost and Margins module
description: Implement Prime Cost page with time-series chart, COGS-by-category donut, labor-by-area donut, and margins card honoring dataCompleteness banner.

tasks.description: Build Prime Cost page at src/app/areas/admin/features/analytics/features/prime-cost/ with stat cards (net sales, prime cost, primeCost%, grossProfitPct) wired to AnalyticsCacheService.primeCost.
Add a p-chart line/bar chart for primeCostPct over the chosen period keys (x = period key, y = pct) with proper labels, currency tick fallback and skeleton while loading.
Add COGS-by-category doughnut chart and labor-by-area doughnut chart using the latest period's byCategory/byArea data, plus a sortable breakdown table.
Add data-completeness banner that renders the response notes[] when status is PARTIAL/EMPTY, plus empty-state and error-state skeletons matching conventions.md surface layering.
Add Prime Cost tests covering chart rendering with mocked service, percent formatting, banner visibility, and PERIOD changes triggering data refresh.
Review Prime Cost UX against conventions, accessibility, data completeness handling, and number currency/formatter consistency.

name: Menu Engineering (BCG matrix) module
description: Implement BCG-style menu engineering matrix quadrant visualization, per-item table, median reference, and cacheStatus banner with categoryId filter.

tasks.description: Build Menu Engineering page at src/app/areas/admin/features/analytics/features/menu-engineering/ with stat cards (items count, total contribution, median volume and margin) wired to AnalyticsCacheService.menuEngineering; include category filter.

Add BCG quadrant scatter/bubble chart (x = grossProfitPerUnit, y = unitsSold, color = quadrant) using p-chart and an item table grouped by quadrant with sortable columns (unitsSold, revenue, contribution) and paginator.
Add cacheStatus banner (lastRefreshedAt, sourceVersion, ttlSeconds) plus notes[] banner for partial data, and skeleton states matching conventions.md.
Add Menu Engineering tests covering quadrant math assignment, median reference, category filter trigger, cache status rendering, and skeleton/empty/error states.
Review Menu Engineering UX for color-blind-safe quadrant palette, accessible table sort, category filter bounds, and performance with many SKUs.

name: Operational Efficiency (RevPASH & Turns) module
description: Implement RevPASH stat cards, table-turnover by day-part chart, occupancy minutes display, and notes banner for fallback to created_at/updated_at approximation.

tasks.description: Build Operations page at src/app/areas/admin/features/analytics/features/operations/ with RevPASH stat cards (value, totalNetSales, totalAvailableSeatHours) wired to AnalyticsCacheService.operations.
Add table-turnover by day-part bar chart (overall + per-dayPart), avgOccupancyMinutes display, and notes[] banner for fallback (orders.open_time/close_time approximation).
Add Operations tests covering day-part segmentation (LUNCH 11-15, DINNER 18-23, OTHER), chart rendering, fallback note visibility, and refresh-on-period-change.
Review Operations UX for day-part visualization clarity, accessibility, error handling, and notes section placement.

name: Customer Cohort module
description: Implement Cohort page with new vs recurring clients KPI cards, recurring rate visualization, and fingerprintStrategy banner.

tasks.description: Build Cohort page at src/app/areas/admin/features/analytics/features/cohort/ with stat cards (newClients, recurringClients, totalOrders, recurringRatePct, averageTicketPerOrder, averageTicketPerCover) wired to AnalyticsCacheService.cohort.
Add new-vs-recurring doughnut visualization, fingerprintStrategy banner showing PHONE/PHONE_OR_TABLE/TABLE_ONLY with translated label, and notes[] fallback banner.
Add Cohort tests covering stat rendering, fingerprint strategy localized labels, and refresh on period change.
Review Cohort UX for clarity of new vs recurring definitions, ticket size formatting, and fallback messaging.

name: Variance Alerts module
description: Implement Alerts list with severity/type/status filters, pagination, mark-read action, and RFC 7807 error handling for PATCH endpoint.

tasks.description: Build Alerts page at src/app/areas/admin/features/analytics/features/alerts/ with filter controls (status, severity, bucket/from/to, limit/offset) wired to AnalyticsCacheService.alerts.

Add alert list rendering (severity color, type icon, message, baseline vs current, deviation%, period, detectedAt) with PrimeNG paginator; wire markRead PATCH endpoint with optimistic update and toast feedback.
Add Alerts tests covering filter application, pagination, mark-read optimistic update, error handling for 404 and network failures, and 204 idempotent behavior.
Review Alerts UX for severity readability, filter clarity, action feedback, and accessibility (announce updated status).

name: Pre-harness lint cleanup so analytics tasks can be marked done
description: Fix the 12 pre-existing lint errors in combo module files so harness is green before declaring analytics tasks done.

tasks.description: Fix 12 pre-existing lint errors in combo module files (general-step: unused DAY_LABELS + non-null assertions; group-step: unnecessary optional chains + unsafe any[] return; pricing-step: unused signal + specialSelectionsMock) by removing dead code, replacing non-null assertions with guarded expressions, and tightening types.

name: Final analytics review, harness and doc hardening
description: Cross-module review of accessibility, performance, docs, and full harness pass.

tasks.description: Run node scripts/harness.js end-to-end and ensure exit code 0 across all blocks. Fix any introduced lint errors or failing tests.
Update progress/history.md with a summary entry for analytics section work; confirm progress/current.md is reset to template at session close.

Final implementation review: contract alignment for all five modules, RFC 7807 mapping consistency, palette/legibility across charts, footer/breadcrumb of analytics nav, navigation back behavior and route guard.
